evidence.text: Open-source local Agent orchestration for self-improving agent teams: run agents, review work, and turn feedback into reusable skills. # Rudder > Build your self-improving Agent Team. Agents that think, build, play, and learn from real work. [Website](https://rudderhq.dev) | [Docs](https://docs.rudderhq.dev) Rudder turns goals, issues, agent runs, reviews, and feedback into a work loop for agent teams. It gives humans and agents a shared operating structure for assigning work, running agents, reviewing outputs, controlling spend, and preserving the lessons that should make the next run better.
